name: backtest-skill
description: TradingView usage skill for running supplied strategies in Strategy Tester, browser operation, result collection, and review.

interface.longDescription: Load supplied Pine or saved TradingView strategies, guide or automate Strategy Tester runs, collect screenshots/tables/exports, analyze result quality, compare parameter or version runs, and produce webhook payloads for already-tested strategies.
defaultPrompt: Use $tradingview-backtest to run this supplied Pine strategy.
Use $tradingview-backtest to audit these Strategy Tester results.
Use $tradingview-backtest to compare these parameter runs.
